data.name: Quarterly access reviews
data.description: All access to production systems is reviewed quarterly by a workspace admin.

data.name: Encryption at rest
data.description: Customer data, including dispute evidence, is encrypted at rest using AES-256.

data.name: Audit logging for autonomous agent actions
data.description: Every autonomous action taken by Counter's dispute agent is recorded in an immutable audit log with operator identity, timestamp, and rollback hash.

data.name: Human-in-the-loop gate before outbound escalation
data.description: Voice escalations require explicit operator approval. The agent cannot dial out autonomously.

data.name: Annual vendor risk assessment
data.description: All third-party vendors handling customer data complete an annual risk assessment.

data.name: Background checks for new hires
data.description: All new employees with access to customer data complete a background check before start date.

data.name: Incident response plan tested annually
data.description: Counter maintains a documented incident response plan and runs at least one tabletop exercise per year.
